npcs.name: Paris Giovanni
npcs.territory: Scottsdale estates and private Elysium venues
npcs.reputation: Inhumanly calm, socially observant, and whispered to command the dead themselves
npcs.story_function: Long-horizon power; authorizes necromancy only as part of extended plans and serves as the silent gravity well around which Giovanni strategy turns

npcs.name: Paulo Benedicto Giovanni
npcs.role: West Coast Regional Head and Phoenix Operations Director
npcs.territory: Scottsdale corporate offices and shell holdings
npcs.story_function: Primary interface with other factions; handles logistics, money, and pressure while deferring to Paris on necromancy

npcs.name: Marianna Giovanni
npcs.territory: Legal firms, trusts, and closed-door negotiations
npcs.story_function: Binds enemies and allies alike through contracts; the pivot point for leverage, with subtle fear of Paris’s inhumanity

npcs.name: Lorenzo Giovanni
npcs.territory: Mobile; appears where a warning must be delivered
npcs.reputation: Efficient, merciless, and unmistakable when unleashed
npcs.story_function: Last-resort violence; absorbs attention and risk to protect the family’s deeper plans and is the acceptable loss if sacrifice is required
